features.name: Project Setup
features.description: Confirm the project can install dependencies, run verification, and start from a clean checkout
features.evidence: Ran ./init.sh successfully executing npm install and npm test

features.name: Configurar Vite React TypeScript
features.description: Instalar e configurar um ambiente Vite React com TypeScript.
features.evidence: Scaffolded Vite project with react-ts template, merged package.json dependencies, and successfully ran verification with ./init.sh.

features.name: Verification Coverage
features.description: Configurar Vitest com @testing-library/react, jest-dom e jsdom. Criar testes para o componente App. Adicionar lint (oxlint) e typecheck (tsc) ao init.sh.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passou: lint 0 erros, typecheck limpo, 4/4 testes vitest passando (renders heading, counter at 0, increment, sections).

features.name: Documentation Update
features.description: Atualizar README.md com stack, estrutura do projeto, comandos disponíveis, instruções de teste e referências ao harness de agentes.
features.evidence: README.md reescrito com stack, estrutura, comandos, seção de testes e harness. ./init.sh passou: lint 0 erros, typecheck limpo, 4/4 testes.

features.name: Cleanup and Handoff
features.description: Commit final, session-handoff.md preenchido, feature_list.json fechado e repositório pronto para reinicialização.
features.evidence: session-handoff.md preenchido, progress.md atualizado, commit final realizado com todas as features concluídas.
